caption: A man with short dark hair and a groomed beard stands in a professional setting, positioned in front of a large window that reveals a blurred cityscape in the background. He is dressed in a dark navy blue suit jacket over a light blue dress shirt and a coordinating light blue tie. In his left hand, he holds a dark-colored tablet or folder. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking and using his right hand to gesture for emphasis. He begins with his hand lowered and slightly closed, then raises it to mid-chest height with his fingers curled, and finally lowers it again slightly while continuing to gesture. His facial expression remains composed and professional throughout the movement, with a slight smile as he speaks. No text, logos, or other people are visible in the scene.
